loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD and voltage deviation as proxies for harmonic distortion and flicker, as specific voltage-harmonic and flicker columns are not logged for this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing THD trends for V-THD and I-THD phases; 5th/7th harmonic orders and scalar stats are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and True PF — PF Gap is derived from active power; yMax/yMin are auto-scaled as no explicit bounds are measured.
